meta.name: viewport
meta.content: width=device-width, initial-scale=1, minimum-scale=1, maximum-scale=5, viewport-fit=cover, user-scalable=yes

head.title: Free Dashboard Icons - Download High-Quality UI & App Icons

meta.name: description
meta.content: A collection of 2595 curated icons for services, applications and tools, designed specifically for dashboards and app directories.

meta.name: keywords
meta.content: dashboard icons,service icons,application icons,tool icons,web dashboard,app directory
Free Dashboard Icons - Download High-Quality UI & App Icons
A collection of 2595 curated icons for services, applications and tools, designed specifically for dashboards and app directories.
Dashboard Icons - Dashboard icons for self hosted services

meta.content: A collection of 2595 curated icons for services, applications and tools, designed specifically for dashboards and app directories.
